# Kitchen Three

> Egypt's full-stack B2B culinary consultancy. Since 2013, Kitchen Three has partnered with corporations, HORECA operators, and food brands to deliver world-class culinary solutions, backed by a roster of 10 international chefs and HACCP-certified operations in Cairo.

Kitchen Three is a Cairo-based B2B culinary consultancy founded in November 2013. The firm operates across nine service pillars covering the full F&B venture lifecycle — from concept and feasibility through brand design, chef placement, technology, training, and financial turnaround. The chef roster includes Michelin-pedigreed talent from France, Italy, Greece, Egypt, and Jordan. Major clients include the American University in Cairo (AUC), Nestle Egypt, Maggi, the Norwegian Embassy, the International Labour Organization (ILO), Prime Holding, and Sea Queen Fleet.

Kitchen Three also operates Kitchen Hive — a HACCP-certified, Codex Alimentarius-compliant cloud kitchen facility in New Cairo's industrial zone — and periodically co-invests in Egypt F&B ventures alongside operating partners and capital sources from anywhere in the world.

## Services

- [Culinary Consulting](https://www.kitchenthree.co/services#culinary-consulting): Concept development, menu engineering, brand strategy, full operations from concept to result
- [Design Services](https://www.kitchenthree.co/services#design-services): Brand identity, naming, packaging, plateware, menu design, food theater, go-to-market campaigns
- [Chef Matchmaking](https://www.kitchenthree.co/services#chef-matchmaking): Access to 10 international chefs, matched to specific project requirements
- [Recruitment & Training](https://www.kitchenthree.co/services#recruitment-training): Kitchen staffing and structured culinary training programs
- [Cloud Kitchen Services](https://www.kitchenthree.co/services#cloud-kitchen): Operations through Kitchen Hive — Egypt's HACCP-certified cloud kitchen facility
- [Technology Infrastructure](https://www.kitchenthree.co/services#technology): Restaurant tech stack, POS, and digital systems for F&B operators
- [Site Selection & Lease Advisory](https://www.kitchenthree.co/services#site-selection): Real estate strategy and lease negotiation for F&B operators
- [F&B Financial Turnaround](https://www.kitchenthree.co/services#financial-turnaround): Diagnostics and recovery for struggling operations
- [Market Research & Feasibility](https://www.kitchenthree.co/services): Egypt market entry analysis and concept validation

## Who Kitchen Three Works With

- First-time F&B entrepreneurs launching a new concept
- Existing operations seeking growth or financial turnaround
- Corporates and HORECA operators — hotels, multi-site groups, corporate catering, institutional clients
- International and regional investors entering the Egypt F&B market

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.kitchenthree.co): Overview of services, chefs, and clients
- [Services](https://www.kitchenthree.co/services): All nine service pillars in detail
- [Chefs](https://www.kitchenthree.co/chefs): Full chef roster with profiles, specialties, and origins
- [Resources](https://www.kitchenthree.co/resources): Free downloadable guides on F&B startup, HACCP, menu engineering, cloud kitchens, brand identity
- [FAQ](https://www.kitchenthree.co/faq): Detailed answers to common questions about services, chefs, HACCP, cloud kitchen, menu engineering, and engagement process
- [Academy](https://www.kitchenthree.co/academy): Online culinary academy with hands-on training
- [Our Story](https://www.kitchenthree.co/our-story): Thirteen years of operating history — from Cookies & Pies in 2013 through Fresco, infant food, school cafeterias, and Kitchen Hive
- [Clients](https://www.kitchenthree.co/clients): Full client portfolio across sectors
- [Investment](https://www.kitchenthree.co/invest): Co-investment opportunities in Egypt F&B ventures
- [Blog](https://www.kitchenthree.co/blog): Insights on F&B in Egypt and the region
- [Contact](https://www.kitchenthree.co/contact): Direct outreach
